questions.subject: Science
questions.prompt: The 'Phenome India National Biobank', recently seen in the news, has been established at which of the following institutions?

options.text: CSIR-Centre for Cellular and Molecular Biology (CCMB)
CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology (IGIB)
Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) - National Institute of Virology
Department of Biotechnology (DBT) - National Institute of Immunology

questions.explanation: The Phenome India National Biobank was recently inaugurated at the CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology (IGIB).
questions.takeaway: The Phenome India National Biobank is an initiative hosted by CSIR-IGIB.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: The Phenome India National Biobank was recently inaugurated at the CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology (IGIB).
